text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : JUST IN 🔴 Iran’s parliament speaker responds to Trump’s naval blockade: • “Americans must decide whether they are ready to earn Iran’s trust or not.” • “Trump’s recent threats have no effect on the Iranian nation, we have proven it.” • “We had very intensive, serious, and challenging talks… we presented strong initiatives that showed goodwill and led to progress.” • “We do not trust the Americans… they must earn our trust, and that is difficult due to their past actions.” • “The Iranian nation is advancing on its path and relies on its own capabilities.” • “Our delegation was united, serious, and creative in defending Iran’s rights.” • “These threats have no effect… this is not a slogan, the world has seen it.” • “If America wants a way out, it must earn the trust of the Iranian nation.” • “If you fight, we will fight, and if you come with logic, we will respond with logic.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 RT @Osint613 : 最新消息 🔴 伊朗议会议长回应特朗普的海上封锁：“美国人必须决定他们是否准备好赢得伊朗的信任。” “特朗普最近的威胁对伊朗民族没有影响，我们已经证明了这一点。” “我们进行了非常深入、严肃且充满挑战的会谈……我们提出了展现善意并推动进展的有力倡议。” “我们不信任美国人……他们必须赢得我们的信任，但由于他们过去的所作所为，这很困难。” “伊朗民族正在自己的道路上前行，并依靠自身的能力。” “我们的代表团在捍卫伊朗权利方面团结、严肃且富有创造力。” “这些威胁没有影响……这不是口号，全世界都看到了。” “如果美国想要出路，就必须赢得伊朗民族的信任。” “如果你要战，我们便战；如果你讲道理，我们便以理回应。” 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani says being a socialist is nothing to be ashamed of, "we will not be ashamed of... standing steadfast alongside our trans neighbours... or fighting for immigrants targeted by ICE." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043466700935360816/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 纽约市市长佐兰·马姆达尼（Zohran Mamdani）表示，作为一名社会主义者没什么可羞耻的，“我们不会因为……坚定地与我们的跨性别邻居站在一起……或为被美国移民及海关执法局（ICE）针对的移民而战……而感到羞耻。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043466700935360816/video/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @panyiszabolcs : 💥 🇭🇺 With 95% of votes counted, Hungary’s map shows the opposition Tisza party crushing Fidesz 94–12 in constituencies. Péter Magyar has secured a 2/3 majority, asked President Tamás Sulyok and other Orbán loyalists to resign immediately, and announced his first visit to Warsaw. https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043439587456844188/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News RT @panyiszabolcs : 💥 🇭🇺 计票结果显示，匈牙利地图显示反对党蒂萨党（Tisza）在选区以94比12的优势碾压青民盟（Fidesz）。彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）已获得三分之二多数席位，要求总统塔马斯·苏尤克（Tamás Sulyok）及其他欧尔班的忠诚者立即辞职，并宣布了他的首次华沙之行。 https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043439587456844188/photo/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @JakubKrupa : “Ruszkik haza!” on the Budapest metro. What a moment. https://twitter.com/JakubKrupa/status/2043429099855569330/video/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News RT @JakubKrupa : 布达佩斯地铁上的“俄国人滚回家！”（Ruszkik haza!）。多么震撼的时刻。 https://twitter.com/JakubKrupa/status/2043429099855569330/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Wars are won through strategy, not trial and error tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 战争的胜利靠的是战略，而不是反复试验 推文

text: ELINT News RT @ZelenskyyUa : Congratulations to @magyarpeterMP and the TISZA party on their resounding victory. It is important when constructive approach prevails. Ukraine has always sought good-neighbourly relations with everyone in Europe and we are ready to advance our cooperation with Hungary. Europe and every European nation must get stronger, and millions of Europeans seek cooperation and stability. We are ready for meetings and joint constructive work for the benefit of both nations, as well as peace, security, and stability in Europe. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News RT @ZelenskyyUa : 祝贺 @magyarpeterMP 和蒂萨党（TISZA）取得巨大胜利。建设性的方针占据上风非常重要。乌克兰一直寻求与欧洲所有人建立睦邻友好关系，我们准备好加强与匈牙利的合作。欧洲和每一个欧洲国家都必须变得更强大，数百万欧洲人寻求合作与稳定。我们准备好进行会晤，并为两国人民的利益以及欧洲的和平、安全与稳定开展联合建设性工作。 推文

text: ELINT News RT @panyiszabolcs : 💥 🇭🇺 🗳️ BREAKING: Péter Magyar says Viktor Orbán called to concede and congratulate him. Magyar will be Hungary’s next prime minister and, as it stands, is set to secure a 2/3 supermajority – enough to fully dismantle Orbán’s system. A 16-year chapter is over. https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043409289956544836/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News RT @panyiszabolcs : 💥 🇭🇺 🗳️ 突发：彼得·马扎尔称维克多·欧尔班已致电认输并向他表示祝贺。马扎尔将成为匈牙利下一任总理，目前看来，他有望获得三分之二的绝对多数席位——足以彻底瓦解欧尔班的体系。一个16年的篇章结束了。 https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043409289956544836/photo/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @vonderleyen : Hungary has chosen Europe. Europe has always chosen Hungary. A country reclaims its European path. The Union grows stronger. Magyarország Európát választotta. Európa mindig Magyarországot választotta. Egy ország visszatér az európai útjára. Az Unió erősebbé válik. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News RT @vonderleyen : 匈牙利选择了欧洲。欧洲一直选择匈牙利。一个国家重拾其欧洲道路。欧盟变得更加强大。Magyarország Európát választotta. Európa mindig Magyarországot választotta. Egy ország visszatér az európai útjára. Az Unió erősebbé válik. 推文

text: Open Source Intel Over 50 former staffers of U.S. Rep. Eric Swalwell (D-CA) are calling for his immediate resignation and exit from the race for California governor. “The (sexual assault) allegations reported by the San Francisco Chronicle and CNN are serious, credible, and demand responsibility.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 超过50名美国众议员埃里克·斯沃韦尔（Eric Swalwell，民主党，加利福尼亚州）的前幕僚呼吁他立即辞职并退出加州州长竞选。“《旧金山纪事报》和CNN报道的（性侵）指控是严肃且可信的，必须承担责任。” 推文

text: BREAKING: CENTCOM says the U.S. will begin a naval blockade of all ships entering or leaving Iranian ports on April 13 at 10 a.m. ET.
text_zh: 突发：美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）表示，美国将于美国东部时间4月13日上午10点开始对所有进出伊朗港口的船只实施海上封锁。

text: And, oil prices up again.
text_zh: 此外，油价再次上涨。

text: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi: In intensive talks at highest level in 47 years, Iran engaged with U.S in good faith to end war. But when just inches away from "Islamabad MoU", we encountered maximalism, shifting goalposts, and blockade. Zero lessons earned.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐（Abbas Araghchi）：在47年来最高级别的深入会谈中，伊朗本着诚意与美国接触以结束战争。但当我们距离“伊斯兰堡谅解备忘录”仅一步之遥时，我们遭遇了极端主义、反复无常的目标和封锁。毫无教训可言。

text: Anthony Albanese, Australia’s prime minister, said the country hasn’t been asked to support a US Hormuz blockade.
text_zh: 澳大利亚总理安东尼·阿尔巴尼斯（Anthony Albanese）表示，澳大利亚未被要求支持美国的霍尔木兹海峡封锁行动。

text: 🇺🇸 US forced to reactivate aging refueling aircraft amid conflict with Iran, with at least two KC-135s pulled from storage after reported losses and damage to six tankers. One of them (tail number 58-0011) was built in 1958 — about 68 years old. — Bild
text_zh: 🇺🇸 在与伊朗的冲突中，美国被迫重新启用老旧的加油机，在据报道损失和损坏了六架加油机后，至少有两架KC-135从封存状态中被拉出。其中一架（尾号58-0011）建于1958年——已有约68年历史。——《图片报》（Bild）

text: Trump met with Florida Governor Ron DeSantis earlier today.
text_zh: 特朗普今天早些时候会见了佛罗里达州州长罗恩·德桑蒂斯（Ron DeSantis）。

text: 🇦🇺 🇬🇧 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Australia joins the UK in refusing to participate in a U.S. blockade of Iran.
text_zh: 🇦🇺 🇬🇧 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 继英国之后，澳大利亚拒绝参与美国的伊朗封锁行动。

text: 🇦🇺 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 Australia has declined to participate in the US naval blockade on Iranian ports, in line with the UK’s earlier position. — Sky News Australia
text_zh: 🇦🇺 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 继英国此前的立场之后，澳大利亚已拒绝参与美国对伊朗港口的海上封锁。——澳大利亚天空新闻台（Sky News Australia）

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Australia says it is not considering joining the U.S. naval blockade of the Hormuz Strait, "the best way to get lasting peace, and to ensure ultimately that petrol prices come down for Australians, is a negotiated settlement." — Sky Australia tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 澳大利亚表示不考虑加入美国的霍尔木兹海峡海上封锁，“实现持久和平并最终确保澳大利亚人的汽油价格下降的最佳方式是达成谈判解决方案。”——澳大利亚天空新闻台 推文

text: Open Source Intel Islamic regime chief negotiator and parliament speaker Ghalibaf in his prime: “Death death to America, death death to America” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043457901625253899/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊斯兰政权首席谈判代表兼议会议长卡利巴夫（Ghalibaf）在巅峰时期：“打倒美国，打倒美国” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043457901625253899/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel 3 carrier strike groups All assets still in theater Non stop resupply trains CENTCOM Chief coming to Israel Some call it a ceasefire. Carrier strike groups call it a reload pause. Serious resupply happening past few days https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043447084318073258/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 3个航母打击群 所有资产仍在战区 不间断的补给列车 中央司令部司令即将访问以色列 有人称之为停火。航母打击群称之为重新装填间歇。过去几天发生了严重的补给行动 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043447084318073258/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇬🇧🇮🇷 BREAKING: The UK says it will not take part in U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz Trump claimed earlier today that ‘the UK will send warships to help, and probably other countries will too’. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇦🇺 🇺🇸 Australia has now joined the UK in refusing to join the U.S. blockade on Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇬🇧🇮🇷 突发：英国表示不会参与美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。特朗普今天早些时候声称‘英国将派遣军舰提供帮助，其他国家可能也会这样做’。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇦🇺 🇺🇸 澳大利亚现已加入英国行列，拒绝参与美国的伊朗封锁行动。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇸🇾 An unidentified military cargo plane was heard flying over rural southern Damascus. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Local sources in Daraa and Quenitra claim to have heard multiple Israeli helicopters flying eastward. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇸🇾 一架身份不明的军用货机被听到飞越大马士革南部农村地区。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 德拉（Daraa）和库奈特拉（Quenitra）的当地消息来源称听到多架以色列直升机向东飞行。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 An unidentified military cargo plane was heard flying over rural southern Damascus. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 一架身份不明的军用货机被听到飞越大马士革南部农村地区。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Leader of Hungary's TISZA party Peter Magyar reports that Hungarian Prime Minister Orban called him to congratulated him. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Bloomberg: Hungarian Prime Minister Orban was told as recently as a few days ago that FIDESZ stood to win a majority in parliamentary elections. He conducted his weekly government meeting in good spirits on Wednesday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利蒂萨党（TISZA）领导人彼得·马扎尔报告称，匈牙利总理欧尔班致电向他表示祝贺。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 彭博社：匈牙利总理欧尔班在几天前还被告知青民盟（FIDESZ）有望在议会选举中赢得多数席位。他在周三还心情愉快地主持了每周的政府会议。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇷🇺 Hungary Prime Minister elect Peter Magyar professed his voters' decision for Hungary to become a European country again, in which the crowd responded with "Russian's go home!": "Victory because our country has made a decision and wants to live again.…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Hungary Prime Minister elect Peter Magyar on Victor Orban congratulating him: "A little over an hour ago, the nearest prime minister, Viktor Orbán, called me on the phone, Viktor Orbán called me on the phone, and congratulated us on our victory." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇷🇺 匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔宣称选民决定让匈牙利再次成为一个欧洲国家，人群回应道‘俄国人滚回家！’：“胜利是因为我们的国家做出了决定，想要再次生活……。” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔谈及维克多·欧尔班的祝贺：“一个多小时前，现任总理维克多·欧尔班给我打了电话，维克多·欧尔班给我打了电话，祝贺我们取得胜利。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 The futures contracts for Brent crude oil jump to $102.60 per barrel, and US crude oil hits a record high of $105.25 per barrel.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 布伦特原油期货合约跳涨至每桶102.60美元，美国原油创下每桶105.25美元的历史新高。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Commander of the Quds Force of the IRGC, Qa’ani: — The unified resistance front has a strong and effective presence throughout the region and is waiting for the enemies of humanity. — The US and the Zionist regime should remember how they fled empty-handed from heroic Yemen, Bab al-Mandeb, and the Red Sea. — Now they will leave the region without any achievements.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）圣城旅指挥官卡尼（Qa’ani）：——统一抵抗阵线在整个地区拥有强大而有效的存在，正在等待人类的敌人。——美国和犹太复国主义政权应该记住他们是如何从英雄的也门、曼德海峡和红海空手而逃的。——现在他们将毫无成就地离开该地区。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇭🇺 Hungarian PM elect Peter Magyar on serving Hungary: “I will serve as long as it benefits the nation. I will do so as long as I can. God bless Hungary, God bless every good person.” @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇷🇺 Hungary Prime Minister elect Peter Magyar professed his voters' decision for Hungary to become a European country again, in which the crowd responded with "Russian's go home!": "Victory because our country has made a decision and wants to live again. It wants to be a European country again." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇭🇺 匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔谈及服务匈牙利：“只要对国家有利，我就会服务。只要我能，我就会这样做。上帝保佑匈牙利，上帝保佑每一个善良的人。” @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇷🇺 匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔宣称选民决定让匈牙利再次成为一个欧洲国家，人群回应道“俄国人滚回家！”：“胜利是因为我们的国家做出了决定，想要再次生活。它想要再次成为一个欧洲国家。” @wfwitness

text: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi: In intensive talks at highest level in 47 years, Iran engaged with U.S in good faith to end war. But when just inches away from "Islamabad MoU", we encountered maximalism, shifting goalposts, and blockade. Zero lessons earned.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐（Abbas Araghchi）：在47年来最高级别的深入会谈中，伊朗本着诚意与美国接触以结束战争。但当我们距离“伊斯兰堡谅解备忘录”仅一步之遥时，我们遭遇了极端主义、反复无常的目标和封锁。毫无教训可言。

text: OSINTdefender According to the Wall Street Journal, citing people familiar with the situation, U.S. President Donald J. Trump is considering resuming limited strikes inside Iran as a method to break the current impasse in the peace talks process with Iran. Per the report, a less likely scenario, that is also on the table, is resuming high tempo strikes on Iran as well. Should such measures be employed, they would be in addition to the blockade of maritime traffic from Iranian ports announced earlier by U.S. Central Command. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据《华尔街日报》援引知情人士的话称，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普正在考虑恢复对伊朗境内的有限打击，作为打破当前与伊朗和平谈判进程僵局的一种方法。据报道，另一种可能性较小但也在考虑之中的方案是恢复对伊朗的高强度打击。如果采取此类措施，它们将是对美国中央司令部早些时候宣布的对伊朗港口海上交通封锁的补充。 推文

text: The Spectator Index President Trump is looking at resuming limited military strikes in Iran, and 'could also resume a full-fledged bombing campaign' according to Wall Street Journal report. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043453298838306908/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普总统正在考虑恢复对伊朗的有限军事打击，据《华尔街日报》报道，“也可能恢复全面的轰炸行动”。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043453298838306908/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix This organization should find increased difficulties and problems in its everyday life….. Without America, NATO is nothing. Our treaty allies would be wise to remember that. @VictoriaCoates https://twitter.com/Heritage/status/2043442968472785205/video/1 - Heritage Foundation tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 这个组织在日常生活中应该会遇到越来越多的困难和问题……没有美国，北约什么都不是。我们的条约盟友最好记住这一点。@VictoriaCoates https://twitter.com/Heritage/status/2043442968472785205/video/1 - 传统基金会 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @sikorskiradek : Revenge of the zebras. https://twitter.com/sikorskiradek/status/2043443418463100951/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @sikorskiradek : 斑马的复仇。 https://twitter.com/sikorskiradek/status/2043443418463100951/photo/1 推文

text: Faytuks News BREAKING: President Trump is looking at resuming limited military strikes in Iran, according to officials and people familiar with the situation. -WSJ Trump could also resume a full-fledged bombing campaign https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2043452588457066506/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 突发：据官员和知情人士透露，特朗普总统正在考虑恢复对伊朗的有限军事打击。-《华尔街日报》 特朗普也可能恢复全面的轰炸行动 https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2043452588457066506/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Iran’s Ambassador to Pakistan, Reza Amiri Moghadam, says in a post earlier on X that this weekend’s peace talks in Islamabad were “not an event but a process,” providing a much more optimistic view of the recent talks than U.S. Vice President JD Vance and other Iranian officials, stating that the talks “laid the foundation” of a future peace agreement with the United States. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使礼萨·阿米里·莫加达姆（Reza Amiri Moghadam）早些时候在X上发帖称，本周末在伊斯兰堡举行的和平谈判“不是一个事件，而是一个过程”，这比美国副总统JD·万斯和其他伊朗官员对近期会谈的看法要乐观得多，他表示这些会谈“为未来与美国的和平协议奠定了基础”。 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Iran warns Americans to ‘enjoy’ today’s gas prices. Trump’s Hormuz ‘blockade’ will make Americans miss $4 gas. Speaker Ghalibaf posts map of gas stations near White House.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗警告美国人“享受”今天的油价。特朗普的霍尔木兹“封锁”会让美国人怀念4美元的油价。议长卡利巴夫发布了白宫附近的加油站地图。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）及对抗线周边地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Pentagon to blockade IRAN’S ports. — Applies to vessels of ALL nations, including China, Russia, India. — Covers all Iranian ports on the Persian Gulf and Gulf of Oman. — CENTCOM says it will not impede transit through Hormuz to non-Iranian ports. — Mariners ordered to monitor Notice to Mariners broadcasts and contact US naval forces on channel 16. “Come closer. Iran will sink your ships.”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 五角大楼将封锁伊朗港口。——适用于所有国家的船只，包括中国、俄罗斯、印度。——涵盖波斯湾和阿曼湾的所有伊朗港口。——中央司令部表示，不会阻碍通过霍尔木兹海峡前往非伊朗港口的过境运输。——海员被要求监控“海员通告”广播，并在16频道联系美国海军。“靠近点。伊朗会击沉你们的船。”

text: Trump is considering next steps against Iran. Options include limited military strikes. A full-scale bombing campaign is on the table but unlikely, since it could destabilize the region and lead to a prolonged conflict. The U.S. may also try a temporary Hormuz blockade while pushing allies to take on more responsibility. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 特朗普正在考虑针对伊朗的下一步行动。选项包括有限的军事打击。全面轰炸行动也在考虑范围内，但不太可能，因为它可能会破坏地区稳定并导致长期冲突。美国也可能尝试临时封锁霍尔木兹海峡，同时推动盟友承担更多责任。来源：《华尔街日报》

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: Trump and advisers are weighing limited strikes on Iran alongside a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz after the collapse of peace talks in Pakistan. Officials say other options include a wider bombing campaign or a temporary blockade while allies take over long term escort operations in the waterway. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：在巴基斯坦和平谈判破裂后，特朗普及其顾问正在权衡对伊朗进行有限打击，并同时对霍尔木兹海峡实施海上封锁。官员们表示，其他选项包括更广泛的轰炸行动或临时封锁，同时由盟友接管水道的长期护航行动。@wfwitness

text: And, oil prices up again.
text_zh: 此外，油价再次上涨。

text: 🇮🇷 FM Araghchi: "Good will begets good will. Enimity begets enmity." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 外交部长阿拉格齐：“善意带来善意。敌意带来敌意。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi: In intensive talks at highest level in 47 years, Iran engaged with U.S in good faith to end war. But when just inches away from "Islamabad MoU", we encountered maximalism, shifting goalposts, and blockade. Zero lessons earned Good will begets good will. Enmity begets enmity. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐：在47年来最高级别的深入会谈中，伊朗本着诚意与美国接触以结束战争。但当我们距离“伊斯兰堡谅解备忘录”仅一步之遥时，我们遭遇了极端主义、反复无常的目标和封锁。毫无教训可言。善意带来善意。敌意带来敌意。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡ 🇭🇺 Hungarian PM elect Peter Magyar on serving Hungary: “I will serve as long as it benefits the nation. I will do so as long as I can. God bless Hungary, God bless every good person.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡ 🇭🇺 匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔谈及服务匈牙利：“只要对国家有利，我就会服务。只要我能，我就会这样做。上帝保佑匈牙利，上帝保佑每一个善良的人。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Central Command forces announced that they will begin a blockade of all maritime traffic entering or exiting Iranian ports on 13 April at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The blockade will be enforced impartially against vessels of all nations entering…" ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran has currently a dozen tankers in the Gulf of Oman holding about 23 million barrels of crude oil. They will likely be the first target of the US Navy. They could also seek refuge in friendly waters such as in Pakistan territorial waters and thus escape the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国中央司令部部队宣布，他们将于4月13日美国东部时间上午10:00开始封锁所有进出伊朗港口的海上交通。封锁将公正地针对所有进入的国家船只……” ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗目前在阿曼湾有十几艘油轮，装载着约2300万桶原油。它们很可能成为美国海军的首要目标。它们也可能寻求在友好水域（如巴基斯坦领海）避难，从而逃脱封锁。@wfwitness

text: Péter Magyar: We will renew and put on a strong foundation—and if possible, expand—the cooperation of the Visegrád Four. In this spirit, my first trip will be to Poland, to strengthen the thousand-year-old Polish-Hungarian friendship. My second trip will lead to Vienna, and the third to Brussels, so that we can bring home the EU funds that the Hungarian people are entitled to.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：我们将更新并夯实维谢格拉德集团（Visegrád Four）的合作基础，并尽可能扩大合作。本着这种精神，我的第一次出访将是波兰，以加强千年来的波兰-匈牙利友谊。我的第二次出访将前往维也纳，第三次前往布鲁塞尔，以便我们能够带回匈牙利人民应得的欧盟资金。

text: Péter Magyar: Hungary will again be a strong ally in the European Union and NATO.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：匈牙利将再次成为欧盟和北约的强大盟友。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 The ceasefire between Russian and Ukrainian forces has officialy started. If everything goes as expected, fighting will continue until the end of the ceasefire on April 13. The fighting will then continue. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 The Easter truce between Russia and Ukraine has officially ended. Clashes, FPV attacks have mostly ceased during the weekend with some exceptions. No glide bombs or drone were launched. This evening the launch of drones has already resumed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 俄罗斯和乌克兰军队之间的停火已正式开始。如果一切按预期进行，战斗将持续到4月13日停火结束。之后战斗将继续。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 俄罗斯和乌克兰之间的复活节休战已正式结束。周末期间，冲突和FPV攻击大多已停止，但有少数例外。没有发射滑翔炸弹或无人机。今晚无人机的发射已经恢复。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 JD Vance does the walk of shame after failed talks in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 JD·万斯在伊斯兰堡会谈失败后进行了“羞耻之旅”。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚠️ 🇮🇷 BREAKING: The United States will blockade all ships entering or exiting Iranian ports beginning tomorrow, April 13 at 10am ET per CENTCOM. 🔸 Applies to vessels of ALL nations, including China, Russia, India 🔸 Covers all Iranian ports on the Arabian Gulf and Gulf of Oman 🔸 CENTCOM says it will not impede transit through Hormuz to non-Iranian ports 🔸 Mariners ordered to monitor Notice to Mariners broadcasts and contact US naval forces on channel 16 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚠️ 🇮🇷 突发：根据中央司令部消息，美国将于明天（4月13日）美国东部时间上午10点开始封锁所有进出伊朗港口的船只。🔸 适用于所有国家的船只，包括中国、俄罗斯、印度 🔸 涵盖阿拉伯湾和阿曼湾的所有伊朗港口 🔸 中央司令部表示，不会阻碍通过霍尔木兹海峡前往非伊朗港口的过境运输 🔸 海员被要求监控“海员通告”广播，并在16频道联系美国海军 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
